articles.title: JMGO’s N3 Ultimate projector is the new portable 4K champ
articles.description: Sorry Anker: JMGO now makes my favorite flagship portable projector. The N3 Ultimate is an excellent portable 4K projector that defeats moderate ambient light at severe placement angles and can rival more expensive home theater installations at night. After a few weeks of testing, I think the raw adaptability exhibited by the JMGO's N3 Ultimate […]
articles.author: Thomas Ricker
